title: Naming of Farmerville Recreation Center
doc_html:
§4712.14.  Naming of Farmerville Recreation Center

The governing authority of the town of Farmerville may name the Farmerville Recreation Center in honor of Willie Davis, Jr.

Acts 2010, No. 248, §1.
